message:
fix: use Root().PersistentFlags() for all persistent flag checks in PersistentPreRun (GH#2514)

fc8ea14c fixed --json but left --readonly, --db, --actor, --dolt-auto-commit,
and --sandbox using cmd.Flags().Changed() which silently fails for persistent
flags on subcommands. This caused explicit flag values to be overwritten by
config defaults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
